heading: Branch transactions
label: 987 Branch transactions
notes: Amendments1988—Par. (4). struck out par. (4) which provided for translation of foreign income taxes paid by each qualified business unit of the taxpayer in the same manner as provided under section 986(b).Pub. L. 100–647

amendments: Amendments1988—Par. (4). struck out par. (4) which provided for translation of foreign income taxes paid by each qualified business unit of the taxpayer in the same manner as provided under section 986(b).Pub. L. 100–647

children.text: by computing the taxable income or loss separately for each such unit in its functional currency,
by translating the income or loss separately computed under paragraph (1) at the appropriate exchange rate, and

children.label: A
children.text: treating post-1986 remittances from each such unit as made on a pro rata basis out of post-1986 accumulated earnings, and

children.label: B
children.text: treating gain or loss determined under this paragraph as ordinary income or loss, respectively, and sourcing such gain or loss by reference to the source of the income giving rise to post-1986 accumulated earnings.
